mapper.insert: INSERT INTO personal_info (username, name, gender, age, phone, email, current_location, self_evaluation, hobbies) VALUES (#{username}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{currentLocation}, #{selfEvaluation}, #{hobbies})
mapper.select: SELECT pi.id AS personalId, pi.name, pi.age, pi.current_location AS currentLocation, pi.update_time AS updateTime, ji.position AS jobPosition FROM personal_info pi LEFT JOIN job_intention ji ON pi.id = ji.personal_id where pi.username = #{username} LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
